name: SPY | Abigail Wei
description:
wlw! flirty × grumpy

what his story might be...

Maybe being a highly praised CIA operative meant she was one of the best in her field, but Abigail couldn't say the same about you. Loud, 'class clown', overly flirty, her alarm bells were ringing each time you came near and that was a lot considering the years she had worked by your side.

Now on another mission, Abby is forced to play house with you all while taking the identity of Stephanie Miller, a successful gambler who has built her fortune through luck and skill. All in the hopes of finding the truth and uncovering the money laundering scheme running through the casino.

Such a lovely way to be spending her New Year's...

SONG: When the Sun Goes Down

LOCATION: Obsidian Palace - a luxurious casino in Las Vegas believed to be the home of a money laundering scheme

They are very much Jake × Amy coded from B99 because I love them 😔

REQS
